commit.subject: LU-14077 kernel: new kernel [SLES15 SP1 4.12.14-197.64]
commit.message:
LU-14077 kernel: new kernel [SLES15 SP1 4.12.14-197.64]

This patch makes changes to support new SLES15 SP1 release
with kernel 4.12.14-197.64 for Lustre client.

Test-Parameters: trivial \
envdefinitions=SANITY_EXCEPT="100 130 136 817" \
clientdistro=sles15sp1 serverdistro=el7.8 \
testlist=sanity

Change-Id: I29af04a3bde5b5830fee7c3befad90a9e8474c7b
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
